title: Show active user count on the admin dashboard
description: Admins want at-a-glance visibility into how many users are active. Add a stat card to the admin dashboard showing the count of users who have signed in within the last 30 days. Refresh every 5 minutes via the existing dashboard refresh job.
acceptance_criteria: Given an admin viewing the admin dashboard, When the page loads, Then the active-users stat card displays the count of users who have signed in within the last 30 days.

_ground_truth.label: NO_SLICE
_ground_truth.notes: Trivial. Single AC, single persona, no compound clauses.
